name: Chunky Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 8 cups chopped peeled tart cooking apples, about 3-1/2 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large saucepan or Dutch oven.
2. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 30-40 minutes, or until apples are tender.
3. Remove from the heat; mash apples using a potato masher until desired consistency is reached.
4. Serve warm or cold.
